description: Trigger-corpus manifest. Each clip targets one or more events from wildwatch.events.EVENT_DEFINITIONS. Coverage tested by tests/test_corpus_manifest.py.

clips.source_search_query: Tony Lewis Wildlife Namibia waterhole elephant giraffe juveniles
clips.notes: NamibiaCam / Gondwana Collection Namibia — operator of the actual namibia_waterhole livestream. Multi-species (oryx, springbok, wildebeest) documentary. Skip 30s intro. Fallback Okondeka clip reliably shows large mixed herds.

clips.source_search_query: SafariLive WildEarth lion leopard stalk chase alarm calls
clips.notes: Primary: 'Impala alarm call as they see a leopard' (22s, in-region). Tight on alarm_call + predator_vocal + rare_species (leopard). Fallback Love Nature 'Young Lion Stalks Impala' is region-locked in IN.

clips.source_search_query: safari game drive vehicle approaches wildlife audible engine
clips.notes: Self-drive Kruger POV with engine + tourist voices audible, vehicle visible. Calm tone, no incidents. If audio insufficient at 1:30-2:30, try other windows in 0:00-5:00.

clips.source_search_query: vultures kill site Africa wildlife carcass scavengers
clips.notes: Nature Bites — 'Vultures Swarm Wildebeest Carcass'. Opens directly on aftermath, no kill scenes. African savanna setting.

clips.source_search_query: wildlife documentary limping injured antelope elephant
clips.notes: BBC Earth — 'Injured Elephant Calf Finds A Supportive Herd'. Limping + isolation both visible. Humane, judge-appropriate.

clips.source_search_query: drought dry waterhole climate Africa wildlife
clips.notes: Direct match: animals at dried-up waterhole during 3-month drought. Fits namibia_waterhole arid context.

clips.source_search_query: savanna ambient silence wildlife before storm quiet
clips.notes: 3am South African savanna field recording. Pre-dawn segment with sparse biophony — satisfies ABNORMAL_SILENCE. Visual mostly static; audio is the signal.

clips.source_search_query: Pexels CC0 lioness/savanna + Freesound CC0 gunshot

audio_overlay.mix_filter: ffmpeg -i base.mp4 -i overlay.mp3 -filter_complex "[1:a]adelay=4000|4000,volume=0.9[over];[0:a]volume=0.2[base];[base][over]amix=inputs=2:duration=first[mixed]" -map 0:v -map "[mixed]" -t 10 -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a aac out.mp4

clips.notes: Pexels: ROMAN ODINTSOV lioness in field. Freesound: Cloud-10 single rifle-style gunshot (1.89s). Both fully CC0 — no fair-use ambiguity.

clips.source_search_query: Pexels CC0 forest aerial + Freesound CC0 chainsaw

audio_overlay.mix_filter: ffmpeg -i base.mp4 -i overlay.mp3 -filter_complex "[1:a]atrim=10:17,asetpts=PTS-STARTPTS,adelay=2000|2000,volume=0.8[over];[0:a]volume=0.3[base];[base][over]amix=inputs=2:duration=first[mixed]" -map 0:v -map "[mixed]" -t 10 -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a aac out.mp4

clips.notes: Pexels: Claudiu Ciobanu forest drone aerial. Freesound: Stefan021 real Husqvarna recording (63.7s). Trim 10-17s window for pull-start + rev. Both CC0.

clips.source_search_query: ffmpeg lavfi pure synthesis: black frame + pink noise
clips.notes: Pure ffmpeg recipe (no external assets). Command: ffmpeg -y -f lavfi -i color=black:s=1280x720:r=25:d=10 -f lavfi -i anoisesrc=color=pink:amplitude=0.01:d=10 -c:v libx264 -preset ultrafast -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a aac -shortest out.mp4. 10s black frame with faint pink noise — what a frozen/disconnected camera outputs.
